
---

## All Publications Chronologically {auto-animate=true auto-animate-id="pub-flow"}

:::: columns

::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.tiniest-text .pub-list}
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar3 data-id="pub-r3-meds-ecosystem"}
Matthew McDermott, Ethan Steinberg, Jason Fries, **Robin P. van de Water**, Chao Pang, Patrick Rockenschaub, Pawel Renc, Jungwoo Oh, Kamilė Stankevičiūtė, Justin Xu, Tom Joseph Pollard, Nassim Oufattole, Michael Wornow, Teya Bergamaschi, Hyewon Jeong, Simon Lee, Vincent Jeanselme, Kiril Klein, Mikkel Odgaard, Maria Elkjær Montgomery, Arkadiusz Sitek, Mads Nielsen, Jeffrey Chiang, Noa Dagan, Isaac Kohane, Shalmali Joshi, Edward Choi, and Nigam Shah. [@McDermott2025MEDS]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar2 data-id="pub-r2-recipies"}
**Robin P. van de Water**, Hendrik Schmidt, and Patrick Rockenschaub. "ReciPies: A Lightweight Data Transformation Pipeline for Reproducible ML"., p. 9261. doi: 10.21105/joss.09261 [@van_de_Water2026]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Matthias Kirchler, Matteo Ferro, Veronica Lorenzini, **Robin P. van de Water**, Christoph Lippert, and Andrea Ganna. [@Kirchler2025GRASP]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Katharina Alefs, Susanne Ibing, Pia Francesca Rissom, Jan Carlo Schmid, Arkadiusz Kwasigroch, **Robin van de Water**, Bernhard Y. Renard, and Eugenia Alleva. [@alefsFoundationModelBasedPropensity2025]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar1 data-id="pub-r1-riepe-90d"}
Christoph Riepe, **Robin van de Water**, Axel Winter, Bjarne Pfitzner, Lara Faraj, Robert Ahlborn, Maximilian Schulze, Daniela Zuluaga, Christian Schineis, Katharina Beyer, Johann Pratschke, Bert Arnrich, Igor M. Sauer, and Max M. Maurer. [@riepe90dayMortalityPrediction2025a]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Bjarne Pfitzner, Max M. Maurer, Axel Winter, Christoph Riepe, Igor M. Sauer, **Robin van de Water**, Christian Denecke, Johann Pratschke, and Bert Arnrich. [@pfitznerDifferentiallyPrivateFederatedLearning2025]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Axel Winter, Bjarne Pfitzner, **Robin P. van de Water**, Lara Faraj, Christoph Riepe, Wolf-Heinrich Hahn, Felix Krenzien, Christian Schineis, Thomas Malinka, and Wenzel Schöning. [@winterOvercomingDataBarrier2025]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
**Robin Philippus van de Water**, Ethan Steinberg, Michael Wornow, Patrick Rockenschaub, and Matthew McDermott. MIMIC-IV Demo Data in the Medical Event Data Standard (MEDS). 2025. doi: 10.13026/T2Y8-EA41. [@vandewaterMIMICIVDemoData2025]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar3 data-id="pub-r3-scaling-talk"}
**Robin P. Van de Water**. "Scaling Up Clinical ML from Datasets to Entire Health Systems through the MEDS Ecosystem". In: *SBHD 2025 International Conference on Systems Biology of Human Diseases*. Berlin, June 2025 [@vandewaterScalingClinicalML2025]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar2 data-id="pub-r2-yaib"}
**Robin van de Water**, Hendrik Nils Aurel Schmidt, Paul Elbers, Patrick Thoral, Bert Arnrich, and Patrick Rockenschaub. "Yet Another ICU Benchmark: A Flexible Multi-Center Framework for Clinical ML". doi: 10.48550/arXiv.2306.05109. [@vandewaterAnotherICUBenchmark2024a]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar3 data-id="pub-r3-meds-working-group"}
**MEDS Working Group**: (alphabetized) Bert Arnrich, Edward Choi, Jason A. Fries, Matthew B. A. McDermott, Jungwoo Oh, Tom J. Pollard, Nigam Shah, Ethan Steinberg, Michael Wornow, **Robin van de Water**. "Medical Event Data Standard (MEDS): Facilitating Machine Learning for Health". 2024. [@vandewaterMedicalEventData2024]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar3 data-id="pub-r3-meds-dev"}
Matthew B. A. McDermott, Aleksia Kolo, Chao Pang, Edward Choi, Ethan Steinberg, Hyewon Jeong, Jack Gallifant, Jason Alan Fries, Jeffrey N. Chiang, Jungwoo Oh, Justin Xu, Kamilė Stankevičiūtė, Kiril Vadimovic Klein, Mikkel Fruelund Odgaard, Nassim Oufattole, Patrick Rockenschaub, Pawel Renc, **Robin van de Water**, Shalmali Joshi, Simon Austin Lee, Teya Bergamaschi, Tom Pollard, Vincent Jeanselme, Nigam Shah, Michael Wornow, Aparajita Kashyap, Xinzhou Jiang, Yanwei Li, Young Sang Choi, Yuta Kobayashi, and Ryan King. [@mcdermottMEDSDecentralizedExtensible2024]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar3 data-id="pub-r3-meds-kdd"}
Matthew B. A. McDermott, Justin Xu, Teya S. Bergamaschi, Hyewon Jeong, Simon A. Lee, Nassim Oufattole, Patrick Rockenschaub, Kamilė Stankevičiūtė, Ethan Steinberg, Jimeng Sun, **Robin P. Van De Water**, Michael Wornow, John Wu, and Zhenbang Wu. "MEDS: Building Models and Tools in a Reproducible Health AI Ecosystem". In: *Proceedings of the 31st ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining* V.2. Toronto ON Canada: ACM, Aug. 2025, pp. 6243-6244. isbn: 979-8-4007-1454-2. doi: 10.1145/3711896.3737608. [@mcdermottMEDSBuildingModels2025a]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Max M. Maurer, Bjarne Pfitzner, **Robin P. van de Water**, Lara Faraj, Christoph Riepe, Daniela Zuluaga, Felix Krenzien, Nathanael Raschzok, Robert Siegel, Christian Schineis, Bert Arnrich, Katharina Beyer, Johann Pratschke, Igor M. Sauer, and Axel Winter. [@maurerPrivacyPreservingFederated2025]
:::


:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.tiniest-text .pub-list}
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar1 data-id="pub-r1-combining-hospital-grade"}
**Robin van de Water**, Axel Winter, Max M. Maurer, Felix August Treykorn, Daniela Zuluaga, Bjarne Pfitzner, Igor M. Sauer, and Bert Arnrich. [@waterCombiningHospitalgradeClinical2024b]
:::
::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar1 data-id="pub-r1-combining-time-series"}
**Robin van de Water**, Axel Winter, Max M. Maurer, Felix August Treykorn, Bjarne Pfitzner, Igor M. Sauer, and Bert Arnrich. [@waterCombiningTimeSeries2024]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Axel Winter, **Robin P. van de Water**, Bjarne Pfitzner, Marius Ibach, Christoph Riepe, Robert Ahlborn, Lara Faraj, Felix Krenzien, Eva M. Dobrindt, and Jonas Raakow. [@winterEnhancingPreoperativeOutcome2024]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Bjarne Pfitzner, Max M. Maurer, Axel Winter, Christoph Riepe, Igor M. Sauer, **Robin van de Water**, and Bert Arnrich. [@pfitznerDifferentiallyPrivateFederatedLearning2024]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Orhan Konak, **Robin van de Water**, Valentin Doring, Tobias Fiedler, Lucas Liebe, Leander Masopust, Kirill Postnov, Franz Sauerwald, Felix Treykorn, and Alexander Wischmann. [@konakHAREUnifyingHuman2023]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Orhan Konak, Alexander Wischmann, **Robin van de Water**, and Bert Arnrich. [@konakRealtimeHumanPose2023a]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
**Robin van de Water**, Francesco Ventura, Zoi Kaoudi, Jorge-Arnulfo Quiane-Ruiz, and Volker Markl. [@vandewaterFarmingYourMLbased2022a] [**Best demonstration paper award**]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
**Robin van de Water**, Francesco Ventura, Z Kaoudi, J Quiane-Ruiz, and Volker Markl. "Farm Your ML-based Query Optimizer's Food!-Human-Guided Training Data Generation-". In: *Conference on Innovative Data Systems Research (CIDR). 2022* [@vandewaterFarmYourMLbased2022]
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Lientje Maas, Mathan Geurtsen, Florian Nouwt, Stefan F. Schouten, **Robin van de Water**, Sandra Van Dulmen, Fabiano Dalpiaz, Kees Van Deemter, and Sjaak Brinkkemper. [@maasCare2ReportSystemAutomated2020]
:::

**Under submission:**

::: {.pub-box}
Jan Carlo Schmid, Susanne Ibing, Stefan Kalabakov, Katharina Alefs, **Robin P. van de Water**, Arkadiusz Kwasigroch, Eugenia Alleva, Bert Arnrich, Bernhard Y. Renard, and Maia Kayal. [@Schmid2025CrohnsPouch]
:::

**Preprints (preparing for submission):**

::: {.pub-box .pub-box--pillar1 data-id="pub-r1-cassandra-main"}
**Robin P. van de Water**, Axel Winter, Daniela Zuluaga Lotero, Bjarne Pfitzner, Lara Faraj, Bert Arnrich, Patrick Rockenschaub, Wenzel Schoning, Thomas Malinka, Christian Denecke, Johann Pratschke, Igor M. Sauer, and Max M. Maurer. [@vandewaterContinuousMultimodalAI2025] (Submitted to Lancet Digital Health)
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Alisher Turubayev, Anna Shopova, Fabian Lange, Mahmut Kamalak, Paul Mattes, Victoria Ayvasky, Bert Arnrich, Bjarne Pfitzner, and **Robin P. van de Water**. [@turubayevClosingGapsImputation2025]
:::

**Manuscripts in preparation:**

::: {.pub-box}
**Robin P. van de Water**, Katharina Marie Alefs, Susanne Ibing, Stefan Kalabakov, Aadil Rasheed, Pia Francesca Rissom, Jan Carlo Schmid, Arkadiusz Kwasigroch, Eugenia Alleva, and Christoph Lippert. *"FLAMES: EHR Foundation Models as a Resource for Health Systems"*. 2026
:::
::: {.pub-box}
**Robin P. van de Water**, Christoph Riepe, Bjarne Pfitzner, Lara Faraj, Daniela Zuluaga, Christian Schineis, Katharina Beyer, Johann Pratschke, Igor Sauer, Axel Winter, and Max Maurer. *"Machine Learning for 30-Day Mortality Prediction for High-Risk General Emergency Surgery".* In preparation (2025)
:::
::: {.pub-box}
Wouter van Amsterdam, Michael Kamp, Rajesh Ranganath, **Robin P. van de Water**, Florian Markowetz, Evangelia Christodoulou, Yamuna Krishnamurthy, Christoph Lippert, Jeff Clark, Julia E. Vogt, Raul Santos-Rodriguez, Thomas Gartner, Gilbert Koch, and Brett Beaulieu-Jones. *"Missing Incentives, Missing Oversight: The Challenges of AI Monitoring in Clinical Practice"*. 2025
:::

::: {.pub-legend .bigger-text}
::: {.pub-legend__item .pub-legend__item--pillar1}
<span class="pub-legend__swatch"></span>
<span class="pub-legend__label">{{< var r1_label >}}</span>
:::
::: {.pub-legend__item .pub-legend__item--pillar2}
<span class="pub-legend__swatch"></span>
<span class="pub-legend__label">{{< var r2_label >}}</span>
:::
::: {.pub-legend__item .pub-legend__item--pillar3}
<span class="pub-legend__swatch"></span>
<span class="pub-legend__label">{{< var r3_label >}}</span>
:::
:::
:::
:::
::::
